更让林风措手不及的是，女神竟然怀了他的孩子！
于是两个人在学生老师的眼皮下，暂时过上了同居生活……

7071","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很温馨很甜但不觉得鼾，而且也没有奶爸文最容易出现的要生孩子了才知道有娃的恶心开局，后期的相处也很自然，双方关系徐循渐进也没有那么多的别扭读感就很舒服，而且系统虽然作用很大但是存在感真的很低，这一点也真的很不错呢[懂了]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1697039843,"group_id":"7281071600529574947","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"懂的都懂，不懂装懂，你懂了么。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nww2r7TrUGQdjhonyuAYqdbtlDkzlfM26J1VoxqGnlbk","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/dd87c3bc9936467f8afb2be89d24a74c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776787657&x-signature=JM68c7uMsbX8b8tN47VowOxnjDI%3D","user_id":"2392131994911000","user_name":"月婵-清风"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2392131994911000","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7281071600529574947","book_info":{"abstract":"大学刚毕业，我就让女神老师放产假！林风被女友甩后，没想与学校女神老师发生了一夜邂逅！
